Stackbit Vanilla Theme

This site was generated by www.stackbit.com, v0.3.34.

The content of this site is managed by Forestry. Visit https://forestry.io to manage site content.

Running Your Site Locally

  1. Install Hugo installation guide

  2. This theme uses Hugo Pipes to handle SCSS, please make sure you have Hugo extended version installed, use hugo version to check

  3. Run the hugo development server

    hugo server

  4. Browse to http://localhost:1313/
